description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: build-mingw on windows-latest for mingw64 with various environments, libraries, and build types; and build-msvc on different Windows environments for MSVC with various architectures, build types, libraries, and GPU configurations. Both jobs check out the repository, set up dependencies, cache build and download resources, configure, build, test, and install.
